footer.description: Family-owned manufacturer of professional cleaning products. Serving B2B customers across Serbia, Germany, and international markets with ISO 9001 & 14001 certified quality.

index.hero_title: Professional Cleaning Solutions for Your Business
index.hero_subtitle: Trusted by restaurants, hotels, and industrial clients across Serbia and Germany. ISO-certified quality since 1990.
index.feature_1_text: Family-owned business established in 1990, serving B2B customers with dedication and expertise.
index.feature_2_text: ISO 9001 & 14001 certified manufacturing processes ensuring consistent, high-quality products.
index.feature_3_text: Tailored solutions for restaurants, hotels, and industrial clients across Serbia and Germany.

index.product_1_text: Professional-grade dishwashing solutions for commercial kitchens

products.hero_subtitle: Professional cleaning solutions for restaurants, hotels, and industrial clients
products.product_1_text: Concentrated formula for maximum efficiency. Cost-effective solution for large operations.
products.product_2_text: Antibacterial formula for high-hygiene environments. Dermatologically tested.
products.product_3_text: Protects colors while delivering deep cleaning. Perfect for hotel linens.
products.product_4_text: High-quality plastic packaging for various applications. Custom branding available.
products.product_5_text: Biodegradable formula with excellent cleaning power. ISO 14001 compliant.
products.product_6_text: Versatile cleaning solution for all hard surfaces. Safe for daily use.
products.product_7_text: 70% alcohol-based formula. Meets WHO and CDC guidelines for hand hygiene.
products.product_8_text: Professional-grade stain remover for commercial laundry. Works on tough stains.

about.hero_subtitle: For over three decades, mik-komerc has developed and manufactured high-quality chemical cleaning products for professional applications. As a family business, we combine tradition with innovation.
about.story_text:
Founded in 1990 in Jovanovac, mik-komerc has grown into one of the region's leading manufacturers of chemical cleaning products. What began as a family business is today a trusted partner for companies across Serbia and Europe.

Our products are used in restaurants, hotels, hospitals, and industrial facilities — wherever cleanliness is non-negotiable.

Quality, affordability, and sustainability are not just words to us. They are the standard we hold ourselves to every single day.
about.story_item_1_text: Over 30 years of experience in cleaning product manufacturing
about.story_item_2_text: Personal service and long-term client relationships
about.story_item_3_text: Supplying clients in Serbia, Germany, and across Europe
about.values_subtitle: These principles have guided us for over 30 years — and are the foundation of our clients' success.
about.value_1_text: The highest standards in production and quality control. ISO 9001 & 14001 certified.
about.value_2_text: Reliable partnerships built on transparency, personal service, and a genuine commitment to our clients' success.
about.value_3_text: Environmentally conscious formulations and responsible production — for today and for the generations to come.
about.cert_subtitle: Our ISO certifications reflect our commitment to quality and environmental responsibility — and are a reliable guarantee of consistently high standards across all processes.
about.cert_iso9001_text: Quality management system ensuring consistent product quality and continuous improvement.
about.cert_iso14001_text: Environmental management system designed to minimize ecological impact and promote sustainable production.
about.mission_text: We develop high-quality, environmentally responsible cleaning solutions that help B2B clients meet their hygiene standards — without compromising on quality or cost-efficiency. Family values, personal service, and responsible business practice are at the heart of everything we do.
about.cta_text: Discover how mik-komerc can support your business with reliable cleaning solutions.
